name: Supabase
description: An open source Firebase alternative providing Postgres database, Auth, Realtime, Storage, Edge Functions and client libraries with REST/GraphQL APIs.

auth_methods.note: Supabase issues JWT access tokens for sessions, supports OAuth providers, and uses project API keys (anon and service_role) for client/server access (service_role treated as a bearer token).

credential_access.note: Supabase documents that API keys (including the anon key and the service role key) can be found in the Supabase Dashboard under Project Settings → API, indicating credentials are self-serve retrievable from the dashboard.

api_surface.note: Reference docs list REST (PostgREST), Realtime (websockets), and GraphQL endpoints, plus client SDKs for multiple languages — covering core product objects (DB, auth, storage, functions).

buildability.note: Public docs and self-serve API keys on the Free tier exist, enabling immediate development.

queries: site:supabase.com/docs Supabase docs developer documentation root API documentation
site:supabase.com "authentication" "auth" "API" supabase auth docs jwt oauth api key
site:supabase.com pricing API rate limits "API access" "pricing" supabase pricing API access paid plan
site:supabase.com/docs "how to get API key" "get API key" supabase dashboard signup "get started"
